'''tatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:sacrally|sacrally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sacrally|sacrally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tatate|tatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tatatesher|tatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tatatesherĂ«m|tatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tatatero|tatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tatateshĂ«|tatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tatateshĂ«m|tatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitatatero|gokitatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitatateshĂ«|gokitatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitatateshĂ«m|gokitatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotatankerom|gotatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotatankeshĂ«|gotatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotatankeshĂ«m|gotatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotatankeya|gotatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tataterom|tataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tatatemu|tatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tatateya|tatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitataterom|gokitataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitatatemu|gokitatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitatateya|gokitatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tatatate|tatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tatatatesher|tatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tatatatesherĂ«m|tatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tatatatero|tatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tatatateshĂ«|tatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tatatateshĂ«m|tatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitatatatero|gokitatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitatatateshĂ«|gokitatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitatatateshĂ«m|gokitatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotatatankerom|gotatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotatatankeshĂ«|gotatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotatatankeshĂ«m|gotatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotatatankeya|gotatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tatataterom|tatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tatatatemu|tatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tatatateya|tatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitatataterom|gokitatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitatatatemu|gokitatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitatatateya|gokitatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠte|tĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠtesher|tĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠtero|tĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠtĂŠtero|gokitĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠterom|tĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠtemu|tĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠtĂŠteya|tĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠtĂŠterom|gokitĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠtĂŠteya|gokitĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:taftafte|taftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:taftaftesher|taftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taftaftesherĂ«m|taftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:taftaftero|taftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:taftafteshĂ«|taftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taftafteshĂ«m|taftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitaftaftero|gokitaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitaftafteshĂ«|gokitaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaftafteshĂ«m|gokitaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotaftafnkerom|gotaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotaftafnkeshĂ«|gotaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotaftafnkeshĂ«m|gotaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotaftafnkeya|gotaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:taftafterom|taftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taftaftemu|taftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:taftafteya|taftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitaftafterom|gokitaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaftaftemu|gokitaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitaftafteya|gokitaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
